name: KARPATHIAN WOLF

reviews.author: Drimosh
reviews.text: I expected a good massage. Got something way more precise. Joseph doesn't guess—he knows where the tension is and actually fixes it. Left feeling looser than I have in a long time.

reviews.author: japurich
reviews.text: I consider myself strong. I lift. I do cardio. I handle my own. But whatever Joseph did? Different league. His technique was like a high-stakes action movie—except instead of explosions, it was knots.

reviews.author: alexisom
reviews.text: Didn't even get to settle in before my body started unraveling. I thought I was tense from today—turns out, this was tension from years ago. Pressure hit just right.

bio_voice: witty, confident, specific, anti-woo-woo, Ukrainian, professional but funny
bio_themes: no crystals / no energy portals / no mercury retrograde
body keeps score / Wolf audits the books
issue: Generic LLM bio was pasted AFTER the real bio on the live profile, diluting the strong original voice
